display_html:
data PropValue
  • = IntValue Int
  • | TextValue Text
name: PropValue IntValue TextValue

display_html:
data Formula event ty
  • = Forall Word (Formula event ty)
  • | ForallN Word (Formula event ty)
  • | ExistsN Word (Formula event ty)
  • | Next (Formula event ty)
  • | NextN Word (Formula event ty)
  • | UntilN Word (Formula event ty) (Formula event ty)
  • | Atom ty (Set PropConstraint)
  • | Or (Formula event ty) (Formula event ty)
  • | And (Formula event ty) (Formula event ty)
  • | Not (Formula event ty)
  • | Implies (Formula event ty) (Formula event ty)
  • | Top
  • | Bottom
  • | PropForall PropVarIdentifier (Formula event ty)
  • | PropForallN PropVarIdentifier (Set PropValue) (Formula event ty)
  • | PropEq (Relevance event ty) PropTerm PropValue
name: Formula Not And Next Forall ForallN ExistsN NextN UntilN Atom Or Implies Top Bottom PropForall PropForallN PropEq

name: unfoldForall

display_html: unfoldForallN :: Word -> Formula event ty -> Formula event ty
name: unfoldForallN

display_html: unfoldExistsN :: Word -> Formula event ty -> Formula event ty
name: unfoldExistsN

display_html: unfoldNextN :: Word -> Formula event ty -> Formula event ty
name: unfoldNextN

display_html: unfoldUntilN :: Word -> Formula event ty -> Formula event ty -> Formula event ty
name: unfoldUntilN

display_html: relevance :: (Ord event, Ord ty) => Formula event ty -> Relevance event ty
name: relevance

display_html: type Relevance event ty = Set (event, ty)
name: Relevance

display_html: interpTimeunit :: (Word -> Word) -> Formula event ty -> Formula event ty
name: interpTimeunit

class Event a ty | a -> ty where
  • ofTy :: a -> ty -> Bool
  • props :: a -> ty -> Map PropVarIdentifier PropValue
  • beg :: a -> Word64
name: Event ofTy props beg

name: Parser

data Context = Context {
  • interpDomain :: [(Text, Set PropValue)]
}
name: Context Context interpDomain

  • | Or
  • | And
  • | Prefix
  • | Eq
  • | Atom
name: Prec Implies Or Atom Prefix And Eq Universe

display_html:
data Fragment0 event ty
  • = Atom (Relevance event ty)
  • | Not (Fragment0 event ty)
  • | And (Fragment0 event ty) (Fragment0 event ty)
  • | Or (Fragment0 event ty) (Fragment0 event ty)
  • | Implies (Fragment0 event ty) (Fragment0 event ty)
  • | Top
  • | Bottom
name: Fragment0 Not And Atom Or Implies Top Bottom

display_html:
data Fragment1 event ty
  • = Atom (Relevance event ty)
  • | NotAtom (Relevance event ty)
  • | And (Fragment1 event ty) (Fragment1 event ty)
  • | Or (Fragment1 event ty) (Fragment1 event ty)
  • | Top
  • | Bottom
name: Fragment1 And Atom Or Top Bottom NotAtom

display_html:
data Fragment2 event ty
  • = Atom (Relevance event ty)
  • | NotAtom (Relevance event ty)
  • | Top
  • | Bottom
name: Fragment2 Atom Top Bottom NotAtom

name: and

name: or

name: findAtoms

data HomogeneousFormula event ty
  • = Or (HomogeneousFormula event ty) (HomogeneousFormula event ty)
  • | And (HomogeneousFormula event ty) (HomogeneousFormula event ty)
  • | Not (HomogeneousFormula event ty)
  • | Implies (HomogeneousFormula event ty) (HomogeneousFormula event ty)
  • | Top
  • | Bottom
  • | PropForall PropVarIdentifier (HomogeneousFormula event ty)
  • | PropForallN PropVarIdentifier (Set PropValue) (HomogeneousFormula event ty)
  • | PropEq (Relevance event ty) PropTerm PropValue
name: HomogeneousFormula Not And Or Implies Top Bottom PropForall PropForallN PropEq

name: equiv

data SatisfactionResult event ty
